recommendations.title: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark
recommendations.overview: A young girl sent to live with her father and his new girlfriend discovers creatures in her new home who want to claim her as one of their own.

recommendations.title: Freaks - You're One of Us
recommendations.overview: After having a chance encounter with a mysterious character, Wendy, a young working class mother, discovers that she has super powers.

recommendations.title: Beneath
recommendations.overview: Six high school seniors celebrating with day's excursion find themselves on rowboat attacked by man-eating fish and must decide who must be sacrificed as they fight their way back to shore.

recommendations.title: The Last Winter
recommendations.overview: In the Arctic region of Northern Alaska, an oil company's advance team struggles to establish a drilling base that will forever alter the pristine land. After one team member is found dead, a disorientation slowly claims the sanity of the others as e

recommendations.title: Escape from Tomorrow
recommendations.genres: Horror, Fantasy, Comedy, Drama, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: In a world of fake castles and anthropomorphic rodents, an epic battle begins when an unemployed father's sanity is challenged by a chance encounter with two underage girls on holiday.

recommendations.title: Feast
recommendations.overview: This Oscar-winning animated short film tells the story of one man's love life as seen through the eyes of his best friend and dog, Winston, and revealed bite by bite through the meals they share.

recommendations.title: El Conde
recommendations.overview: After living for over two centuries, Augusto Pinochet is a vampire ready to die… but the vultures around him won't let him go without one last bite.

recommendations.title: Pod
recommendations.overview: A family intervention goes horrifically awry within the snowy confines of an isolated lake house.

recommendations.title: Let Her Kill You
recommendations.overview: Alone in the mountains of Switzerland, Anne discovers that her isolated chalet is on surveillance and has been bugged. Caught up by her former life as an intelligence secret agent and an affair with her handler, Anne can only count on herself to get

recommendations.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.
